job.title: PCI/DSS Systems Engineer
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: As a PCI/DSS Systems Engineer in Avignon, you ensure the compliance and security of our clients' payment environments. You are the reference expert on the PCI DSS standard.
mission.1: Implement and maintain PCI DSS compliance
mission.2: Carry out security audits and risk analyses
mission.3: Configure and secure payment data environments
profile.1: Bachelor's to Master's degree in computer science or information systems security
profile.2: 4 to 8 years of experience in systems security
profile.3: Expertise PCI DSS (certification QSA ou ISA is a plus)
profile.5: Certifications CISM, CISSP ou ISO 27001 Lead Auditor is a pluss
